refined_fr.refined_fr: The NGHE solution shall analyze the worksite area to identify terrain features, obstacles, and work-zone boundaries to generate a comprehensive worksite model/map.
refined_fr.rationale: The original FR is broad; refining clarifies the specific analysis tasks (terrain, obstacles, work-zone) needed to meet the requirement and supports verification.
refined_fr.verification_idea: Verify by comparing generated worksite model/map against ground truth data and checking completeness of terrain, obstacle, and work-zone representation.
sub_frs: FR1: Analyze terrain features of the worksite area.
FR2: Detect and represent obstacles within the worksite.
FR3: Define and represent work-zone boundaries and areas.

candidate_dps: DP1: Use LIDAR and camera sensor fusion for terrain and obstacle detection.
DP2: Apply machine learning algorithms for obstacle classification and work-zone delineation.
DP3: Generate a georeferenced digital map integrating terrain, obstacles, and work-zone data.
selected_dp.selected_dp: DP1: Use LIDAR and camera sensor fusion for terrain and obstacle detection.

potential_sources: Data dependencies between terrain and obstacle detection algorithms.
coupling_check.notes: The selected DP logically groups sensor fusion for terrain and obstacle detection, minimizing cross-module dependencies.

assumptions_risks: Assumes availability and reliability of LIDAR and camera sensors.
Risk of sensor data noise affecting model accuracy.
High safety criticality requires robust obstacle detection.
selected_dp.recommended_revision: Consider adding explicit DP for work-zone boundary detection to reduce coupling and improve modularity.

im_boundary.name: NGHE Solution
im_boundary.scope: Central processing and analysis of worksite data including terrain and obstacle modeling.

external_interfaces.name: Telemetry
external_interfaces.details: Receives raw sensor data streams (LIDAR, camera) from Vehicle.

external_interfaces.name: Tasking
external_interfaces.details: Sends processed worksite model/map data to Vehicle and Teleoperation modules for planning and execution.

external_interfaces.name: Network Link
external_interfaces.details: Supports data exchange with remote systems and Safety Services.

module_containment_scores.notes: High containment as core processing module; low diffusion risk.
Limited containment; would cause high diffusion if assigned here.
Not suitable for core mapping functions; high diffusion risk.
Safety Services focus on alerts and policies, not mapping.

assigned_im.containment_hypothesis: Centralizing worksite mapping in NGHE Solution minimizes interface complexity and supports integrated data processing.
containment_risks: Potential bottleneck if NGHE Solution module becomes too large or complex.
Dependency on reliable telemetry data input from Vehicle.
assigned_im.recommended_revision: Monitor module size and consider splitting work-zone boundary detection into a separate IM if complexity grows.

fr_dp_gate.reason: The selected DP logically satisfies the refined FR sub-functions with clear mapping and manageable coupling.

diffusion_risks: Low diffusion risk due to centralized containment in NGHE Solution module.
dp_im_gate.containment_notes: Containment scores support assignment to NGHE Solution; interfaces are well-defined and limited.

fr_im_gate.verification_feasibility: Verification can be performed by testing the NGHE Solution module outputs against known site data.
fr_im_gate.allocation_clarity: Clear allocation of FR to DP and IM with explicit interfaces.

recommended_revisions: Consider refining DP to separate work-zone boundary detection for modularity.
Evaluate telemetry data quality and latency impacts on NGHE Solution.

decision.justification: Current level of decomposition and assignments meet requirements with acceptable risk and clarity; ready to proceed to next design phase.
next_level_sub_frs: FR1: Analyze terrain features of the worksite area.
FR2: Detect and represent obstacles within the worksite.
FR3: Define and represent work-zone boundaries and areas.

revise.why: To consider separating work-zone boundary detection to reduce coupling and improve modularity.

assumptions: NGHE Solution module can handle processing load.
evidence_needed: Performance benchmarks of NGHE Solution processing.
